expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output states it cannot verify case-focus coverage due to missing Phase 4a artifacts: "Cannot demonstrate phase4a alignment or case-focus coverage with provided evidence." It only lists what scenarios "would be expected to include" rather than providing an explicit Phase 4a plan covering styling variants/interactions/back-compat outcomes.
